comment_text.sn42.4:1.1: This discourse and the next are to be expanded per SN 42.3.

root_text.sn42.4:1.1: Atha kho hatthāroho gāmaṇi yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā …pe…

translation_text.sn42.4:1.1: Then an elephant marshal chief went up to the Buddha …
translation_text.sn42.4:1.2: “From this day forth, may the Buddha remember me as a lay follower who has gone for refuge for life.”

reference_text.sn42.4:1.1: csp1ed13.497, csp2ed13.497, ms13S4_1556, msdiv356, pts-vp-pli4.310, vri26.298
